AWS m7g.4xlarge (Graviton3, 16 cores / 64 GB). Gateway-under-test pinned to 4 cores (the comparable basis); mock and load generator on 6 cores each so the mock never bottlenecks the streaming sweep. Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
